appDesc.description: Every day Givee.Club prepares a lot of new giveaways for you. To get the key you have to complete small sponsor`s tasks (to enter social group or to vote for something). This extension allows you to check status of the tasks and get game keys!
appDesc.message: Givee.Club Checker - now you can complete GiveAway.su tasks and get game keys!

linkGetIt.description: Anchor of a link to event
